leadText: Aurora Beam (Japanese: オーロラビーム Aurora Beam) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generation II 1.3 Generation III onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Aurora Beam does damage and has an 85/256 (~33.2%) chance of lowering the target's Attack stat by one stage. When used by an in-game opponent, there is an additional chance of 25% for the effect to fail (resulting in an effective chance of 24.9%). Generation II [ edit | edit source ] Aurora Beam now has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Attack stat by one stage. When used by an in-game opponent, there is still an additional chance of 25% for the effect to fail (resulting in an effective chance of 7.5%). This does not apply when Lock-On or Mind Reader are in effect, nor in the Battle Tower . Generation III onward [ edit | edit source ] Aurora Beam's effect no longer has an additional chance to fail when used by an in-game opponent.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad An Ice -type attack. Has a one-in-three chance of reducing the target's Attack power. Stad2 An Ice -type attack. Has a one-in-ten chance of reducing the target's Attack power. G S C An attack that may lower Attack . R S E Colo XD Fires a rainbow-colored beam that may lower Attack . FR LG A rainbow-colored attack beam. It may lower the foe's Attack stat. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. It may also lower the target's Attack stat. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also halve the target's Attack. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで こうげきを はんぶんにさげる MD GtI It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It could also sharply lower the Pokémon's Attack. S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It could also sharply lower the Pokémon's Attack. MD RT DX It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It could also sharply lower the target's Attack.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Stadium Official Player's Guide from Nintendo Power wrongly claims that this move also has a chance to freeze the opponent.
